items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not confirm whether the scenario behavior of 'Graceful degradation when agent confused' is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report. The linked use case outlines the intended behavior but lacks concrete evidence demonstrating that the system can handle the specified scenario effectively. Additionally, prior steps indicate gaps in the implementation of key features related to the scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
